Project Status Report: November 2024

 

This report summarizes progress on the Phoenix Initiative for the month of November 2024. Overall project health is on track, with two workstreams requiring attention.

 

The engineering team has completed all planned deliverables for Sprint 14 and is ahead of schedule on Sprint 15 goals. Deployment to staging was completed on November 12th without incident.

 

Action Items

·        Review and approve infrastructure cost estimates by November 22 — Owner: M. Chen

·        Finalize API contract with Partner B — Owner: T. Williams, Due: November 25

·        Schedule UAT kick-off with client stakeholders — Owner: Project Office

·        Update risk register with new items from the November 10 risk review session

 

Confidential — For internal distribution only. Do not forward outside of Acme Corp without prior approval from the Project Sponsor.
